creator: martin@sumuk.de
text:
/usr/ports/INDEX contains duplicate lines for the ports
	cvsup-16.1e and tripwire-1.2.
	After rebuilding INDEX with 'make -j 8 index' three more duplicate
	lines appear:

	linux_base-6.1
	p5-POE-Component-IRC-1.7
	rdesktop-1.0.0.p19.7.6 22

How-To-Repeat: 	egrep '^cvsup-16.1e|^tripwire-1.2' /usr/ports/INDEX
